sources.description: Ukraine theater boundary polygon used to clip all layers.
sources.recommendedSource: Administrative boundary export covering the theater.

sources.description: Reference oblast boundaries for aggregation and labeling.
sources.recommendedSource: Administrative oblast polygons aligned to Ukraine.

sources.description: Primary OpenStreetMap extract used for roads, rail, water, and settlements.
sources.recommendedSource: Regional OSM extract for Ukraine or the intended theater extent.

sources.description: Landcover source for forests, wetlands, and open terrain.
sources.recommendedSource: Raster or vector landcover dataset clipped later to the theater.

sources.description: Elevation raster used for hillshade, contours, and terrain roughness.
sources.recommendedSource: FABDEM 30m preferred; Copernicus GLO-30 fallback, covering the full theater extent.

sources.description: Optional source for major rivers, reservoirs, and wetlands if OSM data needs supplementation.
